creator: j.enestrom@mailbox.swipnet.se
text:
make buildworld fails after cvsup from FreeBSD-4.2-RELESE to 4.2-STABLE

===> usr.bin
"/usr/src/share/mk/bsd.subdir.mk", line 81: Inconsistent operator for ftp
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: make buildworld

===> usr.bin
"/usr/src/share/mk/bsd.subdir.mk", line 81: Inconsistent operator for ftp
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
*** Error code 1
